trim.name: Audio-Trimmer
trim.description: Audiodateien auf die gewünschte Länge schneiden und kürzen.
trim.metaDescription: Audiodateien auf beliebige Länge schneiden und kürzen. Präzise Start- und Endpunkte festlegen. Kostenloses Online-Tool.
trim.keywords: Audio-Trimmer, Audio schneiden, MP3 schneiden, Audio-Schneider online
trim.unsupported: Dieses Tool erfordert SharedArrayBuffer-Unterstützung. Bitte verwenden Sie einen modernen Browser mit HTTPS.

faq.a1: Die meisten Formate einschließlich MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC und M4A werden unterstützt.
faq.a2: Ja, das Tool verwendet den Stream-Copy-Modus, sodass die Originalqualität ohne Neukodierung erhalten bleibt.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is Audio Trimmer?
intro.content:
Audio Trimmer cuts audio files to your desired length by setting precise start and end times. Uses stream copy when possible for lossless trimming — no re-encoding, no quality degradation.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for professional audio editing directly in your browser.

howToUse.title: How to Use Audio Trimmer
howToUse.content:
1. Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC supported)
  2. Set the start time and end time for the segment you want to keep
  3. Preview the selected audio range
  4. Click Trim to extract the clip
  5. Download the trimmed audio

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Lossless Trimming: Stream copy mode preserves original audio quality
  • Precise Timing: Set start and end times with second-level accuracy
  • Audio Preview: Play the selected range before trimming
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional audio processing in the browser
  • Fast Processing: Stream copy is much faster than re-encoding

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Ringtones: Cut favorite song sections for phone ringtones
  • Podcasts: Trim intros, outros, or dead air from podcast recordings
  • Music Editing: Extract specific sections from songs
  • Voice Memos: Trim voice recordings to the relevant parts
  • Sound Effects: Cut specific sounds from longer audio files

privacy.title: Privacy-First Audio Processing
privacy.content:
Audio trimming runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your audio files never leave your device
  • No server uploads or cloud processing
  • Works offline after FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: What is Audio Converter?
intro.content:
Audio Converter transforms audio files between popular formats: MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC. Convert between lossy and lossless formats for compatibility, quality, or file size optimization.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for reliable audio encoding directly in your browser.

howToUse.title: How to Use Audio Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Upload an audio file in any supported format
  2. Select the target format: MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, or FLAC
  3. Click Convert to process
  4. Download the converted audio file

MP3 for universal compatibility, FLAC for lossless quality, OGG for open-source projects.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Five Formats: Convert between MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC
  • Lossy & Lossless: Choose between compressed (MP3, OGG, AAC) and lossless (WAV, FLAC)
  • Batch Conversion: Convert multiple files at once
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional audio encoding in the browser
  • Quality Preservation: High-quality transcoding with optimal settings
  • Preview: Play the converted audio before downloading

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Compatibility: Convert OGG or FLAC to MP3 for wider device support
  • Quality Upgrade: Convert MP3 to WAV/FLAC for audio editing workflows
  • Web Audio: Convert to OGG for HTML5 audio elements
  • Podcasting: Convert recordings to MP3 for podcast distribution
  • Archiving: Convert to FLAC for lossless audio archival

privacy.title: Privacy-First Audio Conversion
privacy.content:
Audio conversion runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your audio files never leave your device
  • No server processing or cloud encoding
  • Works offline after FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: What is Extract Audio?
intro.content:
Extract Audio rips the audio track from video files and saves it as MP3, WAV, or AAC. Extract music, dialogue, or narration from any video without re-encoding when possible.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for fast audio extraction in your browser.

howToUse.title: How to Use Extract Audio
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file (MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI supported)
  2. Select the output audio format: MP3, WAV, or AAC
  3. Click Extract to pull the audio track
  4. Download the extracted audio file

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Three Output Formats: Extract as MP3, WAV, or AAC
  • Fast Extraction: Stream copy when possible for instant extraction
  • Multiple Video Inputs: Supports MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional audio extraction in the browser
  • Quality Preservation: Original audio quality maintained when stream copying
  • Preview: Play the extracted audio before downloading

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Music Ripping: Extract audio from music videos
  • Podcast Prep: Extract audio from video interviews or recordings
  • Transcription: Extract audio for speech-to-text processing
  • Sound Design: Pull sound effects or ambient audio from video clips
  • Audio-Only Listening: Convert video content to audio for offline listening

privacy.title: Privacy-First Audio Extraction
privacy.content:
Audio extraction runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing or uploads
  • Works offline after FFmpeg core is loaded

volume.name: Lautstärkeregler
volume.description: Lautstärke von Audiodateien anpassen. Vorschau vor dem Anwenden.
volume.metaDescription: Audiolautstärke erhöhen oder verringern. Änderungen in Echtzeit vorhören. Kostenloses Online-Tool.
volume.keywords: Audiolautstärke, Lautstärkeregler, Lautstärke erhöhen, Lautstärke verringern, Audio-Verstärkung
volume.unsupported: Dieses Tool erfordert SharedArrayBuffer-Unterstützung. Bitte verwenden Sie einen modernen Browser mit HTTPS.

faq.a1: Die meisten Formate einschließlich MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC und M4A werden unterstützt.
faq.q2: Kann ich die Lautstärke über das Originalniveau hinaus erhöhen?
faq.a2: Ja, Sie können die Lautstärke auf bis zu 300% des Originals verstärken. Beachten Sie, dass extreme Verstärkung Clipping-Verzerrungen verursachen kann.
faq.q3: Werden meine Dateien auf einen Server hochgeladen?
faq.a3: Nein. Die gesamte Verarbeitung erfolgt vollständig in Ihrem Browser. Ihre Dateien verlassen nie Ihr Gerät. Sie können dies überprüfen, indem Sie die DevTools (F12) öffnen und den Network-Tab prüfen — null Upload-Anfragen.
faq.q4: Kann ich dieses Tool offline nutzen?
faq.a4: Ja. Sobald die Seite geladen ist, funktioniert das Tool vollständig offline. Für die beste Erfahrung installieren Sie PrivaDeck als PWA über Ihren Browser.
faq.q5: Kann ich die Lautstärkeänderung vor dem Anwenden vorhören?
faq.a5: Ja. Klicken Sie auf die Vorschau-Schaltfläche, um zu hören, wie das Audio mit der angepassten Lautstärke klingt. Die Vorschau nutzt die integrierte Audioverarbeitung Ihres Browsers für sofortige Wiedergabe.

intro.title: What is Volume Adjuster?
intro.content:
Volume Adjuster increases or decreases audio volume up to 300%. Boost quiet recordings, reduce loud audio, or normalize volume levels — with real-time preview before saving.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for precise volume control in your browser.

howToUse.title: How to Use Volume Adjuster
howToUse.content:
1. Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC supported)
  2. Adjust the volume slider (50% to 300%)
  3. Preview the adjusted audio in real-time
  4. Click Apply to process
  5. Download the volume-adjusted audio

Be cautious with volumes above 200% — extreme amplification may introduce distortion in quiet recordings.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Volume Range: Adjust from 50% to 300% of original volume
  • Real-Time Preview: Hear the volume change before processing
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional audio processing in the browser
  • Precision Control: Fine-tune volume with a slider
  • Quality Output: High-quality audio processing

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Quiet Recordings: Boost volume of quiet voice recordings or interviews
  • Loud Audio: Reduce volume of overly loud recordings
  • Podcast Leveling: Normalize volume across different podcast segments
  • Music Adjustment: Adjust background music volume for video projects
  • Presentation Audio: Boost audio for presentation recordings

privacy.title: Privacy-First Audio Processing
privacy.content:
Volume adjustment runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your audio files never leave your device
  • No server processing or uploads
  • Works offline after FFmpeg core is loaded
